name: Couscous with Chicken and Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, drained and chopped
1 whole chicken breasts without skin, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine yogurt, tomato, 1 tablespoon chives. Add salt and pepper to taste. Set aside.
2. Cut artichoke pieces in half and set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon oil. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 3 minutes.
4. Add red pepper; sauté for 2 minutes.
5. Add chicken stock; cover and bring to a boil.
6. Stir in couscous, currants, sun-dried tomatoes, and artichokes. Cover and remove from heat. Let stand 5 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, toast pine nuts in a large frying pan for 2 to 3 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove and set aside.
8. In the same frying pan, heat remaining 1 tablespoon over medium-high heat.
9. Add chicken; sauté for 3 minutes or until no longer pink inside.
10. Stir chicken, pine nuts, and salt and pepper into couscous mixture.
11. Remove to a platter and garnish with remaining chives. Serve with yogurt mixture.
